rows.JPja: まさか コーガ<Ruby={2:4}さま>様まで！

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>可恶……林克那个混蛋！<unk[5:1]>
居然成功穿越了那难以攻克的尖刺陷阱！
既然如此，我要在基地里好好训练，
努力学成<Color=red>土遁术<Color=white>！
<unk[4:0:10 65 110 103 114 121]>然后下次一定要把他打个落花流水！
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:9]>可惡……林克那個混蛋！<unk[5:1]>
居然成功地穿越了難以攻克的尖刺陷阱！
既然如此，那我就待在基地裡苦練，
努力學成<Color=red>土遁術<Color=white>！
<unk[4:0:10 65 110 103 114 121]>然後，下次一定要把他打個落花流水！
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:9]>くっそ… リンクの<Ruby={4:6}やろう>野郎め！<unk[5:1]>
あの<Ruby={8:14}なんこうふらく>難攻不落の トゲの<Ruby={2:4}わな>罠をかいくぐるとは！
こうなったら アジトで<Ruby={4:8}たんれん>鍛錬して<Color=red>
<Ruby={4:6}どとん>土遁の<Ruby={2:6}じゅつ>術<Color=white>を<Ruby={4:8}たいとく>体得だ！
<unk[4:0:10 65 110 103 114 121]>そして <Ruby={2:4}つぎ>次こそメッタメッタにしてやる！
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:9]>Urgh... <unk[5:1]>How dare that Link slip past our
impregnable spike trap!

Time to take matters into our own hands.
We'll return to the hideout and master the
<Color=red>Earthwake technique<Color=white>!
<unk[4:0:10 65 110 103 114 121]>And once we do, we're gonna pulverize
him for sure!

rows.CNzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>说起来，定期联络
也有提到过<Color=red>土遁术<Color=white>的事……
之后再重新看下日志好了。
rows.TWzh:
<unk[3:0:12]>話說回來，
定期聯絡好像有提到<Color=red>土遁術<Color=white>的事……
晚點再重看一次日誌好了。
rows.JPja:
<unk[3:0:12]>そういや <Ruby={8:14}ていきれんらく>定期連絡で
<Color=red><Ruby={4:6}どとん>土遁の<Ruby={2:6}じゅつ>術<Color=white>の<Ruby={2:4}こと>事 <Ruby={2:2}い>言ってたな…
あとで <Ruby={4:6}にっし>日誌でも<Ruby={2:2}よ>読みなおすか
rows.USen:
<unk[3:0:12]>Come to think of it, the memo from
HQ mentioned something about the
<Color=red>Earthwake technique<Color=white>...
I better give the manual another read
through later.

<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 49]>Link!<unk[5:1]>


No, never mind. You just have the same
hair color. Too darned easy to mix you
two up. Anyway, get inside.

<unk[3:0:7]><unk[4:0:28 81 117 101 115 116 105 111 110 78 111 114 109 97 108]>Who's there?<unk[5:1]> Wait, you—


<unk[3:0:11]><unk[4:0:24 83 117 114 112 114 105 115 101 76 95 48 49]>You're LINK! Thought you'd ambush us,
did you?! Well, you're the one getting
ambushed today!<unk[1:3:90 0]>
